reference_sources.notes: Mechanism/gate scaffold; deliberately contains no tine length, tuning, or resonator dimensions.
Source-only, not executed; estimate placeholders pending measurement.

notes: No CAD master exists for this product. design.md explicitly withholds tine length/width/thickness, tuning, and resonator geometry until a measured tine mule exists (V5 honesty rule forbids inventing those numbers to seed a parametric master). Stage 0 intake records the concept-level design intent only; Gate A (Alpha shop compile) cannot run without a CAD master and is not started.
